title: CONTACT US
description: If you'd like to submit an article or pitch for consideration please see our submission guide. To report
text:
If you’d like to submit an article or pitch for consideration please see our submission guide.
To report issues with the website or e-mail subscriptions please contact our Managing Editor warroomeditors@gmail.com
We encourage all of our readers to comment and discuss the issues raised by our publications and podcast episodes at the bottom of the individual web pages.
Join the WAR ROOM e-mail list
